details.test: Task 1: Buy cheapest qualifying wooden sailboat with standard survey
Task 2: Request restoration quote for 1965 18 ft runabout
Task 3: Select exterior varnish package (8+ coats, <= $500) and add to estimate
Task 4: Schedule yard tour for 3 people on 15th of next month at 10:00 AM
Task 5: Add two adult life jackets under $120 and select economy shipping (maintenance kits adapted)
Task 6: Build custom restoration plan for 28 ft cabin cruiser with 50% deposit plan
Task 7: Save winterizing guide (30+ years, >= 8 min) to Seasonal Maintenance collection
Task 8: Find similar 30–40 ft sailboat restoration (1970–1985, $50k–$100k) and send inquiry
Task 9: Reserve earliest-pickup wooden boat (adapted due to limited dinghy data)
